title: Looking for Category Manager at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels family as a Category Manager in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
